sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2702" key="ai)sxeorh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰσχεο-ρήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰσχεό-φημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2702.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">talking shameful things</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:445" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">445</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:592" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">592</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
